default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content performance, conversion strategies, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content from "Mastering RAG" and "Mastering Agents" pillars driving significant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Need for improved data segmentation and dashboard creation to accurately track performance](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - ["How to Test AI Agents Effectively" blog performing well; opportunity to optimize high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Plans to redesign resources page and create pillar pages for better content organization](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Blog posts based on "Mastering RAG" and "Mastering Agents" content pillars driving significant traffic](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Discrepancies noted between HubSpot data and current analytics](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - ["How to Test AI Agents Effectively" blog converting well, despite being one of the first GrowthX-produced pieces](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Need to segment organic search data to separate ebooks from other content](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Jackson to provide a report next week on top-performing content, combining traffic and conversion metrics](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

### Data Tracking and Segmentation

  - [Current dashboards created by external party; Jackson needs to build custom dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Potential data cleanliness issues identified, with some numbers appearing lower than HubSpot metrics](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Analytics data only recently implemented, explaining unusual February numbers](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Need to separate ebooks from organic search data for more accurate analysis](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Suggestion to enhance high-performing content with embedded podcasts, cross-linking, and visual elements (e.g., GIFs, ebook images)](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Proposal to create pillar pages for top-performing content, such as "How to Test AI Agents"](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing UX with content enrichment, potentially moving high-performing blogs to standalone landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Plan to leverage new graphics and assets for agent or evaluation-related content](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Website Redesign Plans

  - [Upcoming redesign of resources page to improve navigation and content organization](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Consideration of QOLIO's approach as inspiration for new layout](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Proposed sections: white papers/ebooks, case studies/blogs, pillar pages, and model charts](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Goal to create a more engaging and comprehensive resources section](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### GrowthX Collaboration

  - [Jackson to review proposed topics from GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Mara investigating the possibility of adding Galileo to the Scrunch database](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Potential special pricing for Galileo to be discussed](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Updates on geoprompts with new content pillars to be provided](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jackson to create a report on top-performing content, combining traffic and conversion data](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [Vivek to propose ideas for turning high-performing blogs into pillar pages](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Conor to oversee the redesign of the resources page](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Mara to update on Scrunch database inclusion and potential pricing by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide updated geoprompts incorporating new content pillars](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Team to explore optimization strategies for high-performing content, including visual enhancements and pillar page creation](https://fathom.video/share/9byREU-5or4WtjTPRaYqmgfS6yoyqu5D?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

action_items.description: Segment data & build own dashboards for blog performance
Review growthx proposed topics tab, catch up on reviews
Propose plan for turning top-performing blogs into pillar pages under resources tab
Prepare report on top-performing blogs (traffic + conversion) for next week's meeting
Share update on adding Galileo to scrunch database after director team conversation
